summary: Broad item-system matching PR touching 22 files. It promoted four item translation units to Matching in configure.py, made symbol scope/local-label metadata adjustments for item functions and data, refined item headers and item variable/attribute types, and improved or matched many functions across item source files. The bot report records +7840 matched-code bytes, +9756 linked-code bytes, +376 matched-data bytes, 26 new matches, and 22 improvements in unmatched items.

key_files.role: Promoted itlgunbeam.c, itgamewatchjudge.c, itoldkuri.c, and itgreatfoxlaser.c from NonMatching to Matching.
Adjusted item-related function and data symbol metadata, including global-to-local scope changes and local numeric labels for strings/floats/doubles.
Updated Mewtwo Shadowball item variable and data-attribute field types/layout.

Largest item common source cleanup/matching file; renamed locals, removed dead/generated-looking branches, typed parameters, used tighter block scoping, and added a narrow pragma dont_inline around it_8026CA4C.
Major item source matching changes; bot report records several Ness Yoyo functions reaching 100% and additional near-match improvements.
Major unmatched item improvements; bot report records large gains for it_802A7384 and it_802A6474.
Source matching improvements supported by related header type/layout changes; bot report records multiple Mewtwo Shadowball function gains.
Promoted to Matching and gained new function matches in bot report.

Promoted to Matching and gained function/data/sdata matches in bot report.
Item source matching improvements, including functions reported at 100%.
Smaller item source matching improvements; bot report records itBombhei_UnkMotion3_Anim improvement.

what_changed: Changed 22 files with 869 additions and 1122 deletions in item source, item headers, configure.py, and GALE01 symbols metadata.
configure.py changed itlgunbeam.c, itgamewatchjudge.c, itoldkuri.c, and itgreatfoxlaser.c from NonMatching to Matching.
symbols.txt changed several item text symbols from global to local scope and converted many address-style data symbols for strings/floats/doubles to local numeric labels.
itCommonItems.h corrected several itMewtwoShadowball_ItemVars field types and expanded itMewtwoShadowball_DatAttrs from a homogeneous f32 array into individually typed fields.

it_266F.c replaced temporary/generated-style local names with role names such as unused, bit_idx, word, alloc, alloc_x0, mask, p, i, and sum; removed a disabled/generated #if branch in it_8026CA4C; and changed it_8026CA4C to take HSD_ObjAllocUnk6* and write alloc->x8.
it_266F.c added #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop narrowly around it_8026CA4C.

Bot report recorded 26 new matches and 22 improvements in unmatched items, including complete matches for functions and data in itoldkuri, itnessyoyo, itgamewatchjudge, itgreatfoxlaser, itlgunbeam, it_2E5A, and itlinkboomerang.
smart_moves: Promoted only specific item objects to Matching in configure.py after the PR's changes and bot report indicated matching progress for those units.
Used symbol metadata changes rather than source-level dummy storage for many local strings/floats/doubles, aligning with section/symbol metadata ownership practices.
Converted generated-looking locals in it_266F.c to clearer role names where local roles were apparent.
Removed a disabled/generated alternative implementation in it_8026CA4C and kept a simpler loop using mask, pointer, index, and accumulator variables.
Recovered more specific field types/layout for Mewtwo Shadowball data rather than preserving a broad f32 array where mixed field types were needed.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When many item TUs are just below completion thresholds, a coordinated pass across source, headers, configure object status, and symbols metadata can close several files at once, but each claimed match still needs narrow report evidence.

Local-label symbol metadata changes can be part of matching work for item TUs, especially for local strings and floating constants, but the PR evidence supports only the fact that these metadata edits were made, not a universal rule for when to localize symbols.
Replacing anonymous f32 arrays with individually typed fields can support item matching when accesses show mixed scalar types, as shown by the Mewtwo Shadowball DatAttrs and ItemVars edits.
Generated-looking temporary names can be cleaned to short role names once local roles are clear, such as bit_idx/word for bitset construction and mask/p/i/sum for masked accumulation loops.

naming_conventions.convention: Use short local role names when semantics are locally evident: bit_idx, word, alloc, alloc_x0, mask, p, i, sum.
Keep unknown/global address-style function names where semantics are not recovered, e.g. it_8026CA4C, it_802998A0, it_802996D0, rather than inventing semantic names.
Use local numeric labels in symbols metadata for file-local strings/floats/doubles when metadata indicates local scope.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Narrow dont_inline pragma around a difficult function can be used as a matching tactic, but this PR excerpt provides no human explanation beyond the code change; apply the existing avoid-pragmas-register-asm standard before reusing.
For masked item-kind accumulation, express the loop naturally with a shifting u64 mask, pointer increment, index increment, and scalar accumulator rather than retaining generated #if/M2C-style code.
Use metadata scope fixes in symbols.txt for local text/data labels instead of compensating in C source when the matching problem is symbol ownership or local data labeling.
Promote an object from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py only when the PR's changes and matching report support complete matching status for that object.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Item matching passes may require coordinated source, header, configure, and symbols metadata edits
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2438 touched item C files, item headers, configure.py Matching status, and GALE01 symbols metadata while the bot report recorded 26 new matches and 22 unmatched-item improvements. This is evidence for a PR-specific pattern, not a blanket rule to mix unrelated data work into code matching.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Clean generated locals to role names where local roles are obvious
accepted_candidate_records.text: In it_266F.c, generated-style locals such as var_r29/var_r28 and temp-style allocation names were replaced with role names such as bit_idx, word, alloc, alloc_x0, mask, p, i, and sum while preserving address-style function names.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover mixed field layouts instead of preserving broad homogeneous arrays
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2438 changed itMewtwoShadowball_DatAttrs from f32 x1C[9] to individual fields including an s32 at x20 and adjusted several ItemVars field types. This supports a local lesson to recover specific typed fields when accesses require mixed scalar types.

source_update_candidates.title: Item matching status changes in PR #2438
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2438 changed configure.py so melee/it/items/itlgunbeam.c, melee/it/items/itgamewatchjudge.c, melee/it/items/itoldkuri.c, and melee/it/items/itgreatfoxlaser.c were listed as Matching instead of NonMatching.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a source-owned path/status fact from the PR diff and should be curated as a path fact rather than treated as a general lesson.

source_update_candidates.title: PR #2438 adjusted item symbol scopes and local labels
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2438 changed several item-related symbols in config/GALE01/symbols.txt from global address-style names to local numeric labels or local function scope, including itLgunbeam_UnkMotion0_* text symbols and multiple .data/.sdata/.sdata2 strings/floats/doubles.
source_update_candidates.reason: The diff supports specific metadata edits; curator should decide whether to record path/symbol facts without generalizing into a global naming rule.

source_update_candidates.title: Check whether narrow dont_inline usage around it_8026CA4C needs a local exception note
source_update_candidates.text: The PR added #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop around it_8026CA4C in src/melee/it/it_266F.c. The loaded slice does not include author rationale, so this should not be promoted as accepted style without more verifier context.
source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards treat pragmas as exceptions requiring evidence; curator may want to link this PR as an example only if additional objdiff/build context exists.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all data/local-label changes in symbols.txt are universally desirable; the PR only proves these specific edits occurred and were associated with a positive bot report.
Do not infer human reviewer intent or approval details; no review comments were loaded.
Do not generalize the dont_inline pragma as normal item decomp style; the excerpt lacks the verifier rationale required by standards.
Do not claim every touched file became 100% matched; the bot report lists a mix of new matches and partial improvements.
